text.title: Voice Agents: Production Checklist and Monitoring
text.summary: Pre-launch checklist, metrics to track, security requirements, and agent-specific gotchas for production voice deployments.

list.item: Test with real phone numbers and real accents — simulator accuracy differs from production
Measure end-to-end latency p95 across all pipeline components
Test barge-in with background noise and concurrent speakers
Verify tool call latency under 2 seconds for all integrations
Test escalation flow to human agent
Configure call recording consent disclosure (if recording)
Secure all API keys in environment variables

rule.statement: Track average handle time, task completion rate, escalation rate, and per-component latency in production. p95 latency per component reveals where to optimize.
rule.rationale: Voice agent quality degrades gradually as conversation flows evolve. Without per-call metrics, regressions are invisible until user complaints surface. Weekly review of conversation transcripts and latency distributions enables proactive optimization.

list.item: Average handle time (target: task-dependent, typically 3-7 minutes for support)
Task completion rate (target: >70% for well-designed flows)
Escalation rate (target: <20%; high rate indicates prompt or flow issues)
p95 turn latency broken down: STT / LLM / TTS / tool call

rule.statement: Budget for per-minute telephony billing (Retell, Vapi, Bland) — not per-LLM-token — when using managed platforms. A 5-minute call at $0.09/min costs $0.45 regardless of how many turns it takes.
rule.rationale: Voice platform cost models differ fundamentally from text API cost models. Teams that budget using token estimates significantly undershoot actual costs for telephony-based deployments.

antipattern.description: Autodialing for outbound campaigns without TCPA/GDPR consent workflow.
antipattern.reason: TCPA (US) fines are $500-$1,500 per unconsented call. GDPR consent is required for EU citizens. Implement explicit consent collection and storage before any outbound campaign, and verify consent records are accessible to the agent for audits.
